Class Heros

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
public final class Heros extends Object
Main character class managing health, level progression, inventory, gold transactions, and status effect mechanics including curse penalties.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Heros()
    Initializes the hero with starting stats (40 HP, 3 Energy).

  • Constructor Details

    • Heros

      public Heros()
      Initializes the hero with starting stats (40 HP, 3 Energy).

  • Method Details

    • applyCurseRemovalPenalty

      public void applyCurseRemovalPenalty()
      Applies a temporary Max HP penalty (20%) when a curse is removed. Lasts for 2 combats.

    • triggerStartTurnEffects

      public void triggerStartTurnEffects()
      Triggers effects like regeneration or burn at the start of the turn.

    • debuterTourCombat

      public void debuterTourCombat()
      Resets energy and calculates passive protection from armor.

    • recevoirDegats

      public void recevoirDegats(int damage)
      Processes damage intake, handling protection and Dodge charges.
      Parameters:
      damage - raw damage value.

    • gainXp

      public int gainXp(int amount)
      Handles level-up and XP progression.
      Parameters:
      amount - XP gained.
      Returns:
      number of levels gained.

    • decrementCursePenaltyDuration

      public void decrementCursePenaltyDuration()
      Decrements curse penalty duration and restores Max HP if duration ends.

    • triggerEndTurnEffects

      public void triggerEndTurnEffects()
      Processes end-of-turn status effects like Poison.

    • calculateFinalScore

      public int calculateFinalScore()
      Calculates total final score (Max HP + inventory value).
      Returns:
      final score.

    • getPv

      public int getPv()
